images.caption: Figure 2:Probability of correct answer as a function of arithmetic loadCC(total digits×\timesnon-zero digits) across input modalities for Gemini 2.5 Flash (), Qwen3-VL-30B (), and Qwen3-VL-235B (), with OpenAI’s 4o (), 5.4 (), and xAI’s Grok 4.20 () models. Curves show fitted logistic regression models for numeric/alphabetic text, image renderings of those prompts, and audio (where possible).Note:Gemini 3.1 Pro performed flawlessly across all modalities within the range ofCCin the original evaluation suite (1-100), but also took over an hour per modality (as opposed to minutes for other models) and used far more output tokens than other models (by a factor of at least 10). Further trials were therefore run over a larger range ofCC(1-400). In this extended analysis, Gemini 3.1 Pro began to degrade at aCCvalue of around 360, which occurs, for example, in a problem like:1632178320×5683473970 = ?.\texttt{1632178320}\times\texttt{5683473970 = ?}.
